channel.title: US Top News and Analysis
channel.description: CNBC is the world leader in business news and real-time financial market coverage. Find fast, actionable information.

item.title: Brent falls below $76, notching its lowest level since day before U.S.-Iran war
item.description: U.S. President Donald Trump intensified pressure on oil companies to lower gasoline prices following the recent decline in crude.

item.title: Three New York Democrats backed by Mamdani win House seat primaries; 2 incumbents lose
item.description: Two candidates backed by the Democratic Socialist of America won their primaries, a year after the DSA-backed Zohran Mamdani won New York mayor's race.

item.title: Tech companies would have to pay AI data center energy costs under bill moving in Congress
item.description: A House subcommittee may advance legislation Wednesday to make tech companies pay the energy costs for operating data centers to power AI.

item.title: Stock futures are mixed ahead of Micron earnings; tech stocks rebound after sell-off: Live updates
item.description: Memory stocks rose in premarket trading Wednesday, as U.S. stock futures were mixed ahead of the opening bell.

item.title: Defense stocks plummet on report Germany is scrapping warships; Rheinmetall stock down 13%
item.description: Berlin is planning to scrap a multi-billion-euro project to build the F126 frigates, according to the Financial Times.

item.title: BlackBerry has morphed into a 'mission critical' player in tech, making it a buy, says Stifel
item.description: The investment firm initiated coverage of BlackBerry with a buy rating.

item.title: House passes affordable housing bill, sends it to Trump's desk
item.description: The House on Tuesday gave final passage to a bill aimed at lowering costs for homebuyers and reining in private equity.

item.title: Alphabet added to Dow Jones Industrial Average, replacing Verizon
item.description: Alphabet will replace Verizon in the Dow Jones Industrial Average.

item.title: 'No cracks in the armor': Tech stocks rebound after global AI selloff batters chip stocks
item.description: Technology stocks mostly rebounded on Wednesday amid choppy trading following a global selloff in the previous session.

item.title: The biggest wealth transfer in history is here: How the next generation will spend the trillions
item.description: The greatest wealth transfer is underway, and heirs who are set to inherit are preparing to use the money very differently from the generations that built it.

item.title: Ukraine is raising the cost of war for Russia — and testing Putin's resolve
item.description: A string of political victories and deep-strike successes has bolstered confidence in Ukraine amid its long-running war with Russia.

item.title: PGA Tour CEO Brian Rolapp unveils sweeping changes to professional golf
item.description: Changes to the PGA Tour are designed to elevate competition and raise payouts for winners.

item.title: SpaceX raises $25 billion in debt sale less than two weeks after IPO
item.description: SpaceX raised $25 billion in a debt sale, after seeing nearly $90 billion worth of orders, sources say.

item.title: CFTC sues Kentucky over actions against prediction markets, making it first red state to face federal scrutiny
item.description: The commission has now sued nine states in its battle to defend what it sees as its exclusive right to regulate event contracts.

item.title: Cerebras falls 10% after chipmaker forecasts shrinking margin in first earnings report since IPO
item.description: Cerebras went public on the Nasdaq in May, giving Wall Street access to a pureplay AI company.

item.title: VIX owner Cboe jumps into prediction markets to build on zero-day options growth
item.description: Global markets operator Cboe has launched its first prediction markets products to meet consumer demand in the fast growing sector.

item.title: Anthropic’s Mythos model found vulnerabilities in classified U.S. government systems, official says: AP
item.description: One of Anthropic's artificial intelligence models identified vulnerabilities in highly sensitive U.S. government computer systems, the Associated Press reports.

item.title: An AI price war could steal the thunder from pending Anthropic, OpenAI IPOs
item.description: Companies are bemoaning AI's hefty price tag, and some are looking at cheaper models that are nearly as good.

item.title: Inside Kevin Warsh's selection process for the next Atlanta Fed president
item.description: Choosing a new head for the Federal Reserve Bank of Atlanta is an opportunity for new Fed Chairman Kevin Warsh to reshape the central bank.

item.title: Why FedEx is down after a strong quarter — and its impact on our stock rating
item.description: We knew this report would be transitional, even messy, given the separation of FedEx Freight.

item.title: Senate backs Iran war powers resolution as GOP pressure grows on Trump's deal to end war
item.description: Senate Republicans want more details on Trump’s Iran deal as questions swirl around sanctions relief, nuclear restrictions and congressional approval.

item.title: 5 best credit unions for auto loans in July 2026
item.description: Credit unions often offer lower interest rates on car loans and tend to be more flexible when working with borrowers who have poor credit.

item.title: Tankmaker KNDS lays out IPO plans amid defense selloff in Europe
item.description: KNDS plans to list shares in Paris and Frankfurt, with current shareholders expected to sell up to 20% of existing share capital.

item.title: Morgan Stanley doubles China humanoid robot shipment forecast as commercialization accelerates
item.description: Morgan Stanley has sharply raised its outlook for China's humanoid robotics market, as early commercial deployment in real-world scenarios accelerated.

item.title: MSCI keeps South Korea as emerging market, delays Indonesia review amid downgrade risk
item.description: The review comes amid hopes that Seoul could be included in MSCI's Developed Markets watchlist.

item.title: Factory job cuts in June neared financial crisis and Covid levels, S&P says
item.description: Though the firm's manufacturing index ran better than expected for June, it came largely from an inventory rebuild and despite sharp job cuts.

item.title: Bill Gates testimony on Jeffrey Epstein ties released by House oversight panel
item.description: "I should never have met with Epstein in the first place," Bill Gates told members of the House Oversight and Government Reform Committee.

item.title: Strait of Hormuz evacuation plan to begin for ships stranded in Persian Gulf, maritime organization says
item.description: More than 11,000 seafarers stuck in the Persian Gulf will begin to exit through the Hormuz Strait in a large-scale evacuation plan backed by Iran and the U.S.

item.title: Traders are loving this cheap way to make big bets against chip stocks
item.description: Just a day after making new all-time records, the semiconductor sector is down almost 7% and traders are finding a cheap way to bet on a bigger pivot.

item.title: Meta announces new smart glasses starting at $299, as Zuckerberg keeps pushing wearables
item.description: Meta executives have said they see the lightweight smart glasses as a step towards a more advanced device that includes screens in the lenses.
